name: mostGetFBlockID, mostGetFunctionID, mostGetOpType
title: mostGetFBlockID, mostGetFunctionID, mostGetOpType
description: These functions return the FBlockID, FunctionID or OpType of the message.

parameters.name: msg
parameters.description: Message variable of type mostMessage or mostAMSMessage

return:
FblockId, FunctionId, OpType
Note
These values are determined independent of the message type and if applicable independent of the TelId. The Values are only valid if the message is out of the function catalog.
